record.field: Execute Task Color Compute for Due Invoice

date_after_5_days = datetime.date.today() + datetime.timedelta(days=5) company_ids = env['res.company'].search([]) for company_id in company_ids: number_of_days_authorized_in_late = datetime.date.today() - datetime.timedelta(days=company_id.number_of_days_authorized_in_late + 1) invoice_ids = model.sudo().search([('move_type', '=', 'out_invoice'), ('state', '=', 'posted'), ('payment_state', '!=', 'paid'), ('invoice_date_due', '<=', date_after_5_days), ('invoice_date_due', '>=', number_of_days_authorized_in_late)]) partner_ids = invoice_ids.mapped('partner_id') + invoice_ids.mapped('partner_id').mapped('parent_id') project_ids = env['project.project'].sudo().search([('partner_id', 'child_of', partner_ids.ids)]) project_ids.compute_project_color_remaining_hours()
Project blocking allowance days based on company
Project blocking allowance days based on company
